doc_go_summary: Package app wires the shared runtime config, observability, lifecycle, and runner contract used by every PCG hosted command. Constructors load runtime config, build the lifecycle, and bind a Runner so the binary's main function only needs to call Application.Run. ComposeLifecycles chains start/stop hooks with rollback on partial start; MountStatusServer adds the shared admin and metrics surfaces from internal/runtime to a hosted app.

types.name: Application
types.desc: Holds Config, Observability, Lifecycle, Runner; Run starts and blocks

functions.name: New
functions.desc: Constructs bootable Application for the named service with ContextRunner as default runner

functions.name: NewHosted
functions.desc: Constructs bootable Application with a supplied Runner; calls LoadConfig and NewLifecycle

functions.name: ComposeLifecycles
functions.desc: Combines lifecycle hooks into one ordered chain; Start rolls back on partial failure; Stop reverses

functions.name: MountStatusServer
functions.desc: Adds NewStatusAdminServer (and NewStatusMetricsServer when MetricsAddr differs) to Application lifecycle

functions.name: NewHostedWithStatusServer
functions.desc: Combines NewHosted and MountStatusServer in one constructor

caller_pattern.description: Every hosted binary main that uses app follows this shape
steps: Application.Run(ctx) -> calls Lifecycle.Start, Runner.Run, deferred Lifecycle.Stop

lifecycle_invariants: Application.Run requires both Lifecycle and Runner; either nil is a startup error
ComposeLifecycles rolls back already-started parts on first Start error
MountStatusServer only adds separate metrics listener when MetricsAddr is set and differs from ListenAddr
Stop is always called via defer even when Run returns an error
telemetry_note: No metrics, traces, or structured logs are emitted directly from this package; telemetry is owned by the runtime and status servers it composes in
